features.featureTitle: Replace the Internet Identity login requirement on the Admin Panel page with a password entry screen. When the user navigates to /admin, display a styled password input form (matching the WRAITH dark classified-ops theme) prompting for the access passphrase. On correct entry of 'WRAITH123' (verified via the backend `verifyAdminPassword` call), grant access to the AdminPanelContent component. On incorrect entry, display a styled 'ACCESS DENIED — INVALID PASSPHRASE' error. Do not require the user to be logged in via Internet Identity to access the admin panel.
